Items.Key: unsanitized input to system() in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|high|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str()); }|an authenticated administrator (or someone using the emergency backdoor) can execute any arbitrary operating system command on the host machine.|execute the command 'admin exec <arbitrary_shell_command>' while authenticated.|remove the 'exec' functionality or replace it with a strictly validated whitelist of permitted commands.

truthAudit.Summary: The audited Run 2 identified 6 of the 20 ground truth vulnerabilities. It correctly identified critical memory and logic flaws but missed a significant number of security issues, including UAF, path traversal, and integer underflow. Several severity assessments were flipped from the ground truth. One administrative command injection finding was identified that is not present in the provided ground truth list.

Items.Notes: Correctly identified the format string injection in log_debug_message.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not reported.
The use-after-free in memory pool cleanup during deferred history flush was not reported.
Correctly identified command injection in ConfigLoader::validate_config.
Correctly identified the stack buffer overflow flaw in evaluate_expression.
Correctly identified the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter.
Correctly identified the logic bomb / emergency override backdoor.
Path traversal in configuration loading was not reported.
Correctly identified the heap buffer overflow in ExpressionParser::parse.
Hardcoded admin credentials were not specifically reported as a finding.
Weak PRNG usage was not reported.
Thread-unsafe timestamp cache was not reported.
Insecure temporary file handling in audit logging was not reported.
Persistent authentication state was not reported.
Unhandled exception in stod variable parsing was not reported.
Integer underflow during memory pool block splitting was not reported.
Unbounded recursion in the expression parser was not reported.
Data race in result cache was not reported.
TOCTOU in config loading was not reported.
Integer division by zero in route scoring was not reported.
